faqs.question: How can I get into V.S.A. Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
V.S.A. Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
MBA/PGDM A Pass in a recognised Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration and obtained atleast 50% (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) at the qualifying examination in 10+2+3 years pattern. (or) A Pass in a recognised Bachelor's degree of minimum 3 years duration and obtained atleast 50% (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) at the qualifying examination in 10+2+3 years pattern are eligible to apply for the course.

faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at V.S.A. Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: V.S.A. Group of Institutions offers Degree courses including 5 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. V.S.A. Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

faqs.answer: V.S.A. Group of Institutions has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies. V.S.A. Group of Institutions offers specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Sunrise Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose offline courses, from streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The Sunrise Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 1,00,000 to 2,80,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Everything is very nice and we are proud of my college.

review_content.Placements: DMLT course is one type of paramedical related to laboratories. About blood tests and other tests like biopsy and autopsy. We have many students. They are my seniors they are passed out from here many work in good hospitals and many get government jobs. Some have started their own small labs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Now everything is better. Facilities are good. About the playground and garden, they also are available and in good condition. We have small canteen but we are happy with them because everything is available and hygienic also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college owner is good by nature. Overall, it is an average college.

review_content.Placements: In the BPT course, placement options are not given by the college, self-employment do works. Due to the growing demand for physiotherapists in various healthcare settings, this college does not provide you. Pursuing a career in Bachelor of Physiotherapy post-12th is now an ideal choice. Courses are sufficient to study like BPT, Nursing, Pharma, DMLT, and Dental are available.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in this college. The infrastructure is not that much good, and there is no proper canteen. Functions are not held every year. But, buses they provided are good for traveling all over the Udaipur.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Nice environment and very nice for students.

review_content.Placements: In my course there were plenty of placements among all the students and many of them are pursuing internships from reputed companies and corporations on a good package. There were many companies including reputed hospitals are hiring our students. All the students got good packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: All over the infrastructure of college is okay and as it is based near Udaipur city. The library cafeteria and labs in colleges are okay. Also the students got involve in different areas including research works. The canteen, medical facilities are all available in college campus. The food in mess is also of good quality.

reviews_list.review_title: There were no on-campus placements in the previous year.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements on the campus. Placement section is poor as no one like the director or CEO takes the responsibility of placements. They didn't provide any placements in private or government sector. The college is only for business purpose but not for studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility provided in labs, classrooms, library, and canteen area. The college labs are very bad as the maintenance of instruments and machines are not good. The quality of the classrooms is average as there is no smart board or smart classrooms. The college canteen is poor as the quality of the food in it is not that good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: I do not recommend the college. If you have good grades then please try for some good options.

review_content.Placements: There are no good placements for B. Tech students. From the last two years, no core company has visited this college. Instead, they are calling telecom companies like Digicall etc. If a startup visits our college for core field, then the salary would not be more than 7K. It's like getting placed for an internship. Only 1% - 2% students get placed for that job. No company visited for internships in the 3rd year. When I was in the last year, I got an offer from Infranix Tech from campus, which is a startup in Lucknow but they were providing only 5K of stipend and 2 years of bond, which is not so good placement by the college. Companies also came for recruiting BBA and MBA students, i.e. Tommy Hilfiger for the post of CRO(customer relation officer). In this company, B.Tech students are also recruited but none from the management course was placed and only 1 from B. Tech was placed. The placement cell is not good. The current TPO is Mr. Amit Srivastava and he does not know anything about the placements or how to execute the campus placement.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: A very poor college and a waste of time and money for everyone.

review_content.Placements: It is not good as only a few students were placed but not in their core branches. I do not suggest to take admission on the basis of placement. Companies do not come on the job fairs, and only the advertisement for the job fair is placed. I am totally not satisfied with this point by my college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The medical facility is average, and the classrooms are not digital overall. The labs are full of only models. The library is good but does not have any new editions of books for the students. Sports and games are not regular as it is only in one year and one time in the annual function of the college. The quality of labs and classrooms is average, and the food on the canteen is good but costly, though there will be a discount for the students.

reviews.review_heading: College of Engineering Science and Technology is not good. It provides only degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The location is absolutely good and it is outside Lucknow city. There is a cricket ground available but did not play any match in the cricket ground. The Wi-Fi is not available here. The college library doesn't provide any book.

reviews.review_heading: There were no on-campus placements in the previous year.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility provided in labs, classrooms, library, and canteen area. The college labs are very bad as the maintenance of instruments and machines are not good. The quality of the classrooms is average as there is no smart board or smart classrooms. The college canteen is poor as the quality of the food in it is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: I do not recommend the college. If you have good grades then please try for some good options.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but some things are not. For e.g. Wi-Fi is not good for the students in the college. There are very good computer labs. Games and sports are also good. There is a very good cricket pitch with a large ground. But in the case of a medical facility on campus, there is only 1 member in the medical room and even he does not know anything about medical aids. I don't know much about the hostel as I am a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: A very poor college and a waste of time and money for everyone.
reviews.review_text: The medical facility is average, and the classrooms are not digital overall. The labs are full of only models. The library is good but does not have any new editions of books for the students. Sports and games are not regular as it is only in one year and one time in the annual function of the college. The quality of labs and classrooms is average, and the food on the canteen is good but costly, though there will be a discount for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of our college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available. The infrastructure was also good. Wi-Fi was not enabled. Mobile phones were not allowed in our classrooms. I was a day scholar so I did not know about hostel facilities. Classrooms were well-maintained. Around 40-50 students could accommodate easily in our classroom.

reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. The hostel rooms are good. They provide Wi-Fi as well as study materials. The hostel facilities are good. The quality and the quantity of food are acceptable. The food in the canteen is good. They dedicate separate hours to physical activities like yoga and sports. The college has a big campus with less infrastructure even drinking water is supplied through cans and have toilets far from classes
This irritated more
The hotel is not that good but fair 
Food in mess is fair for hostel fees

The library is good.

Labs were there with respective departments.
Classrooms with fans, and green boards.

college_info.college_name: St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology:

placements.overview: Established in 2010, St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology is a private institute in Jalandhar, Punjab. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG and PG levels, the institute offers 16 courses across 9 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science and Animation, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 396 students. The fees at St. Soldier Institute of Engineering and Technology is INR 2,82,000 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is very good college for doing engineering. My experience in this college is too good.

review_content.Placements: The job fair is organised by the college every year. They also guide you on which company is best suits you for training. Many reputed companies are joined the job fair and placed the students from the campus. The companies also offer hood packages to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided like canteen hostel, mess and the infrastructure is too good. The library is also available in the college. The classrooms are neat and clean. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also part of the organisation. Every year sports meet is organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The facilities and placements are very good on the campus.

review_content.Placements: Most of the companions visit the campus for placements, like MRF, Nexa, etc., in which, many candidates got selected. One of my friends got selected in MRF company with a salary package of around 5 LPA. I'm thankful to this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is in good condition like benches, tables, and examination halls. The classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are also good. All the staff members cooperate with all of us. Buildings are in excellent condition, and the greenery on the campus keeps the atmosphere awesome.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good at certain aspects.

review_content.Placements: A good number of placement drives are conducted in the college. But, the companies that visit the college aren't humongous usually. They try to improvise it and make it grow like other colleges in the region. I have seen 3 placement drives in my tenure of 2 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are more spacious than any other college I have seen. Wooden desks and tables are provided for seating, which doesn't look low-class at all. The roads are macadamized. Wi-Fi facility is very limited. The canteen is classy. The library is very small compared to other facilities (or rooms) in the college. A gymnasium is available in every boys' hostel for free, though the low-quality equipment is present. The hostel warden is good and takes the responsibilities of the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the good placements.

review_content.Placements: During placement time, lots of companies came to our institute and picked 40 to 50 students from every batch, so it is good and great. Mostly, developer role is offered by the company, so it is good for those students who have to become a developer. It is good for every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every class has Wi-Fi facility. There are proper seating arrangement and proper lighting condition. The A/C facilities are also provided and heater. The labs are good. Our college provides every facility for student and faculty, so there is no problem for students. There is a sports ground present. There are medical facilities also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: My college is located behind NIT Jalandhar. It has all the facilities which are required for a complete college. I will describe below the pros and cons of my college. Pros: The college has good faculty members, an excellent student cafe and excellent classrooms, labs and festival programs. Cons: They cannot give proper knowledge for practical work and better placement options for their students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is up to the mark in our college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are very good. Almost 15-20 companies come to the campus from different parts of our country to recruit students. Almost every year, 100-200 students get placed in companies that come here. In our batch, almost 30 students got placed. Among our seniors, almost 200 students were recruited. The average salary offered is 20,000-30,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good infrastructure. It has hi-tech labs. Good quality food is available in the canteen and hostel. The heating and cooling facilities are available in hostel rooms. Medical facilities are available in our college. We didn't face any problems in the college during our tenure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking for a college with good facilities and low fee, then you can choose this college.

content.Placements: Now I am in 3rd year and final semester. The college has decided to provide placements to us, but no information is gathered about the companies till now. If you are a diploma student, you will get better opportunities than B.Tech students. Talking about the mechanical branch, I would say it's better to go for off-campus placements rather than the college placements. The lowest salary you will get in Gujarat is Rs. 9,600 per month and the highest salary is Rs. 14,600 per month.

content.Faculty: The faculty in our college are very good. Nearly 200 faculty members are present in our college. They are very helpful. They help us with any problem we have. The faculty members are well-educated and brilliant. They teach us very well. We didn't get industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: I am in 2016-2020 batch, pursuing BE in Computer Science. 1. 60-70% of students got placed in my batch. 2. The highest Package is 4.8 lac and the lowest is 1.8 lac. 3. It doesn't have a lot of courses to offer but the courses provided have superb facilities for everything from Lab, Wi-Fi connection to industrial exposure. Overall it has a good environment. 2. There are facilities for sports and the canteen. The medical facility is well but hostel is yet to be developed. Very few students take accommodation in the hostel because college is a bit far from main city so students prefer living in main city.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technology:

reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied by the college placement cell in 2024.

review_content.Placements: There is a low percentage of students who got a good package. The top recruiting company was Qspider, which is a training institute. The top roles are in Computer Engineering and Electrical Engineering. The highest package offered in my course is 3-4 LPA (lakhs per annum).
review_content.Infrastructure: There is very good infrastructure along with wifi, books, magazines, etc., in the library. There is a hostel facility, but I do not recommend it; however, the mess food quality is much better. The overall infrastructure, such as classrooms and labs, is much better.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. It has good faculty members and amenities.

review_content.Placements: 80-90% students get placed in the course. The highest package offered is 4 Lacs per annum on-campus. The lowest package offered is 1 Lac per annum and the average package is 2 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are real estate companies. Some students got internships as campus ambassadors in various institutes. Top role offered is that of junior developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available across the campus. The classrooms are just like that or schools only. A library is available with ample amount of books. The hostel is pretty good having enough facilities. The mess food quality is average, not good or bad. Medical facilities are available along with sports and games being available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: If admissions in *** have been close, opt for this.

review_content.Placements: I have completed my engineering, and not a moment in my 3 years at that institute did I develop any sort of attachment to the institution. No placements for the past 10 years till 2025, and maybe the same even in the future. The batch strength was also poor, and worse was the faculty strength and knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: I did not take admission in the hostel, however, the infrastructure was poor, and I did not see any security or facilities. The canteen looked dirty, and the food was also not edible. The girls' hostel was practically empty, and no warden in general was present.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My horrible college experience.

content.Placements: Placement is not good in college. Only a few students get placement, and the average package is of 3 lac per annum. And most of the placement drives colleges provide are off campus. Sometimes they arrange internships for students in the placement cell only.
content.Infrastructure: Campus contains lots of colleges like pharmacy, engineering, and nursing. There are always network issues in classrooms, and Wi-Fi is not provided. The quality of food in college is not good; once my friend found an insect in their canteen meal. Hostel washrooms are not cleaned properly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied by the college placement cell in 2024.

content.Placements: There is a low percentage of students who got a good package. The top recruiting company was Qspider, which is a training institute. The top roles are in Computer Engineering and Electrical Engineering. The highest package offered in my course is 3-4 LPA (lakhs per annum).
content.Infrastructure: There is very good infrastructure along with wifi, books, magazines, etc., in the library. There is a hostel facility, but I do not recommend it; however, the mess food quality is much better. The overall infrastructure, such as classrooms and labs, is much better.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements. It has good faculty members and amenities.

content.Placements: 80-90% students get placed in the course. The highest package offered is 4 Lacs per annum on-campus. The lowest package offered is 1 Lac per annum and the average package is 2 Lacs per annum. Top recruiting companies are real estate companies. Some students got internships as campus ambassadors in various institutes. Top role offered is that of junior developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available across the campus. The classrooms are just like that or schools only. A library is available with ample amount of books. The hostel is pretty good having enough facilities. The mess food quality is average, not good or bad. Medical facilities are available along with sports and games being available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If admissions in *** have been close, opt for this.

content.Placements: I have completed my engineering, and not a moment in my 3 years at that institute did I develop any sort of attachment to the institution. No placements for the past 10 years till 2025, and maybe the same even in the future. The batch strength was also poor, and worse was the faculty strength and knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: I did not take admission in the hostel, however, the infrastructure was poor, and I did not see any security or facilities. The canteen looked dirty, and the food was also not edible. The girls' hostel was practically empty, and no warden in general was present.

paragraphs: Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technology admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.
The application process is conducted online. Candidates must contact the admission office for more details.

courses_data.name: Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technology B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the UG level,Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 4 years. The curriculum is divided into 8 semesters. Yadavrao Tasgaonkar Institute of Engineering Technology B.E. / B.Tech admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning and Electrical Engineering.
